sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98053" key="suzeuktiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συ-ζευκτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n98053.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">conjunctive</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἔγκλισις</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dosith.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.406K.</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
